notes: The game starts with proton version 3.16-6, but it’s not playable yet. While audio and menus work, there's no graphics, just a white screen. DXVK created a log file containing this message: err:  D3D11: Unsupported format: 0. I tried wine D3D11 but that didn't work either.
title: Atelier Totori ~The Adventurer of Arland~ DX - トトリのアトリエ ～アーランドの錬金術士２～ DX
